title: neea anisophylla
intro: Neea anisophylla, also known as the "Anise Leaf Neea" or "Guapilla", is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The leaves of the Neea anisophylla plant have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to their expectorant and mucolytic properties. Herbal preparations of Neea anisophylla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
